title: USSD OTP Not Delivered
symptoms: users do not receive otp during ussd transactions
customer complaints related to otp delivery
checks: check notification-service queue depth on server 192.168.0.249
inspect recent notification error logs at /srv/log/ate/txn-messenger/txn-notification-service
verify cnm (communication network manager) is processing otp requests
likely_causes: sms gateway outage or increased latency
queue processing stopped or stalled on server 192.168.0.249
cnm service not processing or forwarding otp messages
recommended_actions: check message queue status on server 192.168.0.249 using the ate script (main.sh option 2)
if the queue is blocked or not processing, follow the relevant sop-b procedure for notification-service restart
verify cnm service status and confirm it is actively processing otp requests
escalate to the sms gateway provider if the gateway is unreachable or responding with errors
notes: avoid service restarts during peak transaction windows unless explicit approval is granted
always confirm the target environment (prod or dr) before performing any checks or actions
if the issue appears replicated, verify otp delivery behavior in both prod and dr environments
